app.name: pi_agent_rust
app.one_liner: High-performance AI coding agent CLI written in Rust with zero unsafe code.

screens.name: Main Interactive Terminal
screens.purpose: Primary interface for user to issue commands and receive AI-generated code or tool responses.
primary_actions: View streaming AI responses with rich formatting

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve available models or settings from internal registry.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user session or configuration data securely to local storage.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add secure local storage with atomic permissions
week 1: Implement core command parser and dispatcher
week 1: Integrate asupersync runtime for async I/O
week 1: Render basic Rich-style terminal output
acceptance_tests: All built-in tools execute without unsafe code violations
Application starts in under 500ms on x86_64 Linux
Login flow completes successfully for OpenAI Codex on supported platforms
Scrolling and viewport rendering work correctly in interactive mode
